bench1_cognitive_shift.description: ~3k-token predictable prefix then abrupt pivot to complex reasoning

bench2_breadcrumb_memory.description: Unique facts seeded at depth; recalled after extended context

bench3_power_reasoning.description: Sustained nuanced reasoning (debug loops, riddles) under tegrastats monitoring

notes: 31-34 tok/s exceeds ~20 tok/s human reading threshold — real-time interactive use confirmed
12.5W peak stays inside 15W TDP with 2.5W headroom
3.8GB RAM peak: tight on 4GB Nano, comfortable on 8GB Orin
Recall quality at 1B scale is the primary constraint for memory-intensive tasks
